data.author: Matthias Schoepfer
data.message:
CMakeLists.txt: fixing relocatable package issue (#19)

* CMakeLists.txt: fixing relocatable package issue

With the current CMakeLists, the installed package will have an absolute
path, which breaks if the package gets relocated later on.

This patch tries to set up a proper header only ros2 package.

* Cleanup to be more of an INTERFACE library.

Signed-off-by: Matthias Schoepfer <m.schoepfer@rethinkrobotics.com>
Co-authored-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@gmail.com>

data.author: k-okada
data.message:
Fix eigen3 depends (#6)

* fix use of DEPENDS to include eigen3

This is the correct way to make use of catkin_package's DEPENDS
flag. It was plain broken before and I'm pretty sure nobody ever
checked.

* eigen 3.2 does not provdie EIGEN3_INCLUDE_DIRS, only support EIGEN3_INCLUDE_DIR
